# Technical Spec (slimmed — cross-cutting only)

Per-FR technical design moved to each FR file's `## Technical Design` section. This file retains architectural overview, ADRs, cross-cutting patterns, and schemas.

## Architecture

Cross-cutting architecture diagrams and layered-design explanations live here.

## Architecture Decision Records

ADRs stay in place (never auto-archived); archived ADRs use `Superseded-by:` in place per ADR convention.

## Cross-Cutting Schemas

Schemas that span multiple FRs stay here (naming, traceability, patterns).
